elements.title: a trout statue
elements.contents: ... that "Trouty McTroutface" was submitted in a naming contest for a trout statue (pictured)?

elements.title: Appomattox
elements.contents: ... that two inches of excess beam doomed the Confederate gunboat Appomattox?

elements.title: The History of Java
elements.contents: ... that Stamford Raffles collected over thirty tons of Javanese objects to help him write The History of Java?

elements.title: Jamie Duncan

elements.title: VRMMORPG
elements.contents: ... that VRMMORPG fiction such as Sword Art Online influenced public discourse surrounding modern virtual-reality technologies?

elements.title: GreenGreen
elements.contents: ... that the cover of GreenGreen, an extended play by Cortis, features a bridge that the band's members frequently walked past when they were idol trainees?

elements.title: Suzannah Clarke
elements.contents: ... that British opera singer Suzannah Clarke performed annually in North Korea?

elements.title: the union of the two
elements.contents: ... that there are three genders in Plato's Symposium: man, woman, and the union of the two?

elements.title: a darts player nicknamed "The Reaper"
